hypothesis: Pretraining STR-Bamba426M with an additional conformer-serialized textual modality encoding interatomic distances and angles (e.g., atom-pair distance-ordered token sequences) will reduce the QM9 average MAE for HOMO and LUMO predictions by at least 20% compared to the current fine-tuned STR-Bamba426M trained only on 2D textual modalities.
